summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Celebrity Buzz Index iteration 4 with NEW FEATURES. ALL MAJOR FEATURES WORKING PERFECTLY! Successfully verified Wikipedia autocomplete endpoint, A/B/C/D tier system with tiered pricing (A=£18M, B=£12M, C=£7M, D=£3M), Points Methodology modal, tier badges in trending ticker and cards, autocomplete suggestions with photos/names/tiers/prices, category selection, and Add to Team functionality. Backend API 100% success rate (17/17 tests passed).
passed_tests: ✅ NEW: Wikipedia autocomplete endpoint working (10 suggestions for 'Brad Pitt')
✅ NEW: A/B/C/D tier system with correct pricing - A-list £18M+, D-list £3M+
✅ NEW: Points Methodology modal opens with detailed scoring factors and tier multipliers
✅ NEW: Autocomplete suggestions show photo, name, tier badge, and estimated price
✅ NEW: Tier badges display correctly (A-LIST: 17, C-LIST: 17, D-LIST: 17 found in ticker)
✅ NEW: Pricing varies by tier - Leonardo DiCaprio £19M (A-list), Joey Essex £4M (D-list)
✅ Trending ticker shows 12 celebrity photos with 49 tier badges visible
✅ Add to Team works with new pricing and budget deduction
✅ Wikipedia links visible and functional on celebrity cards
✅ Backend API 100% success rate (17/17 tests passed including new endpoints)
✅ AI news generation working with GPT-4o integration
✅ Team management (create, add, remove) fully functional
✅ Budget calculations accurate with new tier pricing
✅ How It Works section displays with tier pricing explanation
✅ Points methodology shows 5 scoring factors and 4 tier multipliers
